description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a spacious, open layout. The exterior is predominantly white with large windows, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The property features a large tiled driveway with a parked car, landscaped areas with trees and shrubs, and a backyard with a swimming pool, wooden deck, and outdoor seating. The front of the house includes a covered porch with columns and a balcony above, while the rear opens to a fenced pool area and patio. The house has multiple entry points, including a main entrance and sliding glass doors leading to the backyard. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, a tiled driveway, and a backyard pool with a wooden deck. The design features open spaces, landscaped areas, and a covered front porch.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front of the house with a tiled driveway, parked car, covered porch, balcony, and landscaped trees.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the side of the house, revealing the backyard pool, wooden deck, and privacy fence.
description_view_2: View 2 focuses on the rear, showcasing the swimming pool, deck, and outdoor seating area within a fenced yard.
description_view_3: View 3 presents the opposite side, displaying the pool area, deck, and the open-plan interior layout visible through large windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with columns, wide steps, and a modern door, complemented by a balcony above.
